issues.description: Missing condition for cost (➀ rest 1 DON). The Activate trigger must include condition HasAttachedDon:1 or similar to represent the mandatory cost.
SearchDeck filter is incomplete. Must specify type:'Supernovas' and maxCards:1 to match 'reveal up to 1 {Supernovas} type card'. Current filter='Any' is incorrect.

SearchDeck does not capture the 'look at 5 cards' mechanic or the 'place rest at bottom in any order' deck arrangement. DSL should use SearchDeck with deckPosition:'Top', limit:5, or add a separate action for deck ordering if supported.

Missing action to Rest this Character as a cost/requirement. The text 'You may rest this Character' indicates an optional additional cost that should be modeled (likely as a separate conditional action or cost field).
